cv.title: CV
cv.subtitle: Create and manage your CV
cv.description: Create, manage and optimize your CV to increase your chances of getting your dream job
cv.templateDescription: 6 modern designs. All with preset colors and fonts.
cv.profilePictureDesc: Add a professional profile picture to make your CV more personal
cv.summaryPlaceholder: Describe your background and what you're looking for

empty.createFirst: Create your first CV to get started. You can save multiple versions for different types of jobs.
empty.tryOtherSearch: Try searching for something else or change the category

deleteConfirm.title: Delete CV
deleteConfirm.message: Are you sure you want to delete this CV? This cannot be undone.

tips.title: 💡 Tip: Customize CV for different jobs
tips.description: Create different versions of your CV for different types of jobs. A CV for retail should highlight customer service, while one for warehouse should focus on logistics and work pace. Mark the CV you use most as "Default" to quickly find it.

ats.analysisDescription: See how well your current CV passes automatic screening in recruitment systems
ats.noCVDescription: You need to create a CV before you can do an ATS analysis.

scoreInfo.good: Your CV will perform well in most recruitment systems (ATS).
scoreInfo.poor: Your CV will struggle in most recruitment systems (ATS).
scoreInfo.roomForImprovement: However, there is room for improvement.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description: Have you filled in name, email, and phone?
contact.tip1: Make sure your email is professional
contact.tip2: Double-check that the phone number is correct

summary.title: Summary/Profile
summary.description: A short summary significantly increases your chances
summary.tip1: Write 2-3 sentences about who you are
summary.tip2: Mention what type of role you're looking for

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.description: Have you listed your previous jobs?
experience.tip1: Start with your most recent job
experience.tip2: Use bullet points for job duties

keywords.title: Keywords from the job ad
keywords.description: Does your CV match the job ad keywords?
keywords.tip2: Include important skills they're looking for

skills.title: Skills
skills.tip1: Add both technical and soft skills
skills.tip2: Include skills requested in job ads

fileFormat.title: File Format
fileFormat.description: Is your CV saved in the right format?

graphics.title: Images and Graphics
graphics.description: ATS systems can struggle with images
graphics.tip2: Make sure the text is well-structured

headings.title: Headings and Sections
headings.description: Clear headings help ATS parse the content
headings.tip2: Avoid creative headings the system won't understand

profileImage.title: Profile Picture
profileImage.description: A professional picture increases your chances
profileImage.tip2: Make sure the background is neutral

template.title: Template Selected
template.description: Are you using a modern CV template?
template.tip1: Choose a template that fits your industry
template.tip2: Avoid overly creative templates for traditional jobs

languages.title: Language Skills
languages.description: Have you specified your language skills?
languages.tip1: Specify proficiency level for each language
languages.tip2: Swedish and English are often required

whatIsAts.title: What is ATS?
whatIsAts.description: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software used by employers to manage job applications. The system automatically scans CVs looking for keywords and qualifications that match the job ad.
whatIsAts.importance: An estimated 75% of all major companies use ATS. If your CV isn't optimized, it may be filtered out before a human even sees it.

cta.title: Want to improve your CV?
cta.description: Go back to the CV builder and make adjustments

tips.title: CV Tips & Guide
tips.description: Learn how to write a CV that actually gets results. Follow our tips to increase your chances of being called for an interview.

short.title: Keep it short
short.content: Max 2 pages. Recruiters spend an average of 6 seconds on the first screening.

customize.title: Customize every time
customize.content: Read the job posting and customize your CV for each application. It takes time but pays off.

feedback.title: Ask for feedback
feedback.content: Let someone you trust read through your CV. Fresh eyes see things you missed.

pdf.title: PDF is safest
pdf.content: Always save as PDF when submitting. This preserves the formatting.

structure.title: Structure & Layout
structure.description: A clear structure makes it easy for recruiters to find information
structure.do1: Use clear headings for each section
structure.do2: Have consistent formatting throughout the CV
structure.do3: Use bullet points to list job duties
structure.do4: Put the most important information first
structure.dont2: Make the CV too long (max 2 pages)
structure.dont3: Use complex design that disrupts readability

content.title: Content & Wording
content.description: What you write is more important than how it looks
content.do1: Customize the CV for each job you apply for
content.do2: Use concrete numbers and results ("Increased sales by 20%")
content.do3: Start each point with an active verb
content.do4: Focus on results, not just job duties
content.do5: Include keywords from the job posting
content.dont2: Write too long texts - be concise
content.dont4: Use jargon only your current workplace understands

important.title: Important Sections
important.description: What should you include and in what order?
important.do1: Start with contact information at the top
important.do3: List work experience in reverse chronological order
important.dont5: Write out the full address (city is enough)

ats.title: ATS & Recruitment Systems
ats.description: How to pass the automatic screening
ats.do3: Use common fonts like Arial or Calibri
ats.do4: Include keywords from the job posting
ats.do5: Make sure the text is selectable (not images)
ats.dont5: Use special characters that may cause issues

adjustments.title: Adjusting for Long-term Unemployment
adjustments.description: Special tips for those who have been out of the job market
adjustments.do3: Mention courses or education you've done during the gap
adjustments.do4: Be honest but positive about gaps
adjustments.do5: Use functional CV format if changing industries
adjustments.dont2: Leave completely empty periods without explanation
adjustments.dont5: Give up - your experience is valuable!

spelling.title: Spelling and grammar
spelling.desc: Read through multiple times or ask someone else to check

generic.title: Too generic
generic.desc: "I'm a positive person" says nothing. Give examples!

long.title: Too long
long.desc: No one has time to read 4 pages. Prioritize the most important.

email.title: Unprofessional email
email.desc: Get a new email if yours is "partyqueen95"

keywords.title: Missing keywords
keywords.desc: Read the job posting and use the same words they use

cta.title: Ready to create your CV?
cta.description: Use our CV builder with built-in tips

video.title: Video guides
video.description: Watch our video tutorials on how to write a winning CV

ats.description: Test how well your CV passes recruitment systems

tips.title: Tips for better results
tips.tip1: Aim to contact 5-10 new companies per week
tips.tip2: Always follow up after 1-2 weeks if you haven't heard back
tips.tip3: A response rate of 10-20% is normal for spontaneous applications
tips.tip4: Quality over quantity – customize each application

explore.tryDifferentSearch: Try changing your search or filters

templates.reconnectText: Hi! It's been a while since we last talked. How are you? I'm currently looking for new challenges and wanted to hear how things are going for you.
templates.askAdviceText: Hi! I hope all is well with you. I'm in a career transition and would appreciate your insights about [industry/area]. Would you have time for a brief chat?
templates.internshipText: Hi! I've seen that [company] is doing exciting things in [area]. I'm looking for internship opportunities and would love to hear more about your operations.

adaptation.introText: Here you can identify what adaptations would help you in working life. You can then create a document to share with employers, the Social Insurance Agency, or the Employment Service.
adaptation.selectHelpful: Mark the adaptations that would help you. You can select multiple in each category.
adaptation.generateDoc: Generate a document to share with your employer

physical.title: Physical adaptations
physical.description: Adaptations that facilitate physical work tasks

cognitive.title: Cognitive adaptations
cognitive.description: Support for memory, concentration, and planning

organizational.title: Organizational adaptations
organizational.description: Changes in work organization and schedules

adaptation.rightsText: Employers are responsible under workplace legislation to adapt the workplace for employees with disabilities.
adaptation.fkSupportText: The Social Insurance Agency can contribute to work aids and support to facilitate your return to work.

tips.tip4: See if the company offers the benefits that matter to you

bup.name: Child and Youth Psychiatry (BUP)
bup.description: Emergency help for children and youth

cognitive.title: Cognitive training
cognitive.description: Exercises to strengthen your memory and concentration

tips.title: Tips for cognitive training
tips.tip1: Practice regularly - 10 minutes a day is better than an hour a week
tips.tip2: Challenge yourself, but not so much that it becomes frustrating
tips.tip3: Combine with physical activity for best results
tips.tip4: Sleep is crucial for cognitive recovery

focus.title: Focus exercise
focus.description: Train concentration for 10 minutes without interruption

prioritization.title: Prioritization training
prioritization.description: Sort tasks by importance and urgency

workingmemory.title: Working memory
workingmemory.description: Remember instructions while doing something else

distractedreading.title: Distracted reading
distractedreading.description: Read and understand text with background noise

consent.fullDesc: To use the diary and health features, we need your consent to collect and store sensitive health data.
consent.whyDesc: The data is used to give you personal insights about your wellbeing and to customize recommendations during your job search. We analyze trends to help you understand what affects your mood.
consent.whoAccessDesc: Only you and your counselor (if you have one) can see your health data. Data is never shared with employers or third parties.
consent.dataProtection: Your data is protected under GDPR and stored securely in the EU. You can export or delete all your data at any time.
consent.canWithdraw: You can withdraw your consent at any time
consent.withdrawDetail2: All your health data can be deleted upon request
consent.withdrawDetail3: Withdrawing consent does not affect previously stored data

insights.increaseRate: Increase pace: Users who apply to 5+ jobs have 78% chance of interview within 30 days

smartMatches.title: Smart matching
smartMatches.fillCVDescription: Add more information to your CV to get personalized job recommendations based on your skills.

errors.generic: Something didn't go as planned. We'll help you move forward.
errors.connection: We're having connection issues. Your work is saved locally.
errors.timeout: It took longer than expected. Trying again...
errors.loadFailed: Could not load data. Please try again.

empty.noJobs: No jobs found right now. New opportunities are coming!
empty.noApplications: You haven't applied to any jobs yet. We're here when you're ready.
empty.noResults: We didn't find anything this time. Let's adjust the search together.
empty.noResultsQuery: We found no jobs matching "{{query}}". Try changing your search or use filters.
empty.noApplicationsDesc: You haven't submitted any applications yet. Start searching for jobs and track your applications here.
empty.noSavedJobsDesc: When you find interesting jobs, you can save them here to come back to later.
empty.noNotificationsDesc: When you create job alerts, new matches will appear here.
empty.noCvDesc: Create a professional CV to increase your chances of getting a job.

helpPage.intro: Find answers to common questions or contact us if you need more help.
helpPage.contactConsultant: Contact your employment consultant for personal help and guidance.

createCV.q: How do I create a CV?
createCV.a: Go to the CV section and follow the step-by-step guide. You can choose from different templates and get AI help with the wording.

interestGuide.a: The Interest Guide helps you find careers that match your personality and interests. It takes about 10 minutes to complete.

saveJobs.a: When searching for jobs, you can click the heart/save button on each job ad to save it to your job tracker.

multipleCVs.q: Can I have multiple CV versions?
multipleCVs.a: Yes! You can save multiple versions of your CV and choose which one to use for each application.

aiWriter.q: How does the AI letter writer work?
aiWriter.a: The AI analyzes the job ad and your CV to write a cover letter that matches that specific job.

atsAnalysis.a: ATS (Applicant Tracking System) is software that many companies use to filter CVs. Our analysis helps you optimize your CV to get past these systems.

howToSearch.q: How do I search for jobs through the portal?
howToSearch.a: Use the job search function to search among job openings. You can filter by location, profession, and employment type.

saveVsApply.q: What's the difference between saving and applying?
saveVsApply.a: When you save a job, it's added to your job tracker so you can return to it later. Applications are usually made through the company's website.

jobAlerts.q: Can I get notifications about new jobs?
jobAlerts.a: Yes, you can set up job alerts in your settings to receive emails when new jobs matching your criteria are published.

knowledgeBase.q: What can I do in the Knowledge Base?
knowledgeBase.a: The Knowledge Base contains articles, guides, and tips about everything from CV writing to interview techniques and labor law.

exercises.a: The exercises are interactive tools that help you practice various aspects of job searching, like selling yourself or preparing for interviews.

saveArticles.a: Yes! Click the bookmark icon on any article to save it to your bookmarks.

knowledgeWidget.tipsDescription: Tips on CVs, interviews, and job searching

crisis.ariaLabel: Open support and help - for those who are struggling or need someone to talk to
crisis.introText: It takes courage to seek help. If you're feeling down, anxious, or just need someone to talk to - there's always someone who will listen. You don't have to go through this alone.
crisis.alwaysHope: There is always hope, even when it doesn't feel like it right now.

suicideLine.name: Suicide Helpline
suicideLine.description: For those having thoughts of taking their own life

companion.name: On-call Companion
companion.description: Someone to talk to when things feel tough

priest.description: Via 112 - ask to speak with the on-call priest

mind.description: Information and support for mental health

umo.name: UMO.se
umo.description: Support for young people about mental health

activityWidget.takeYourTime: Take the time you need - the portal is here when you want.
activityWidget.lowActivityMessage: It's okay to have periods of lower activity. The important thing is that you come back when you feel ready.

followUp.title: Follow up application
followUp.message: It's been a week since you sent an application. Time to follow up?

diaryWidget.consultantMeetingDescription: You have a meeting with your career consultant
diaryWidget.addEventsDescription: Add interviews, meetings and deadlines to keep track of your job search

careerWidget.exploreAndFindPath: Explore occupations and find your path

coverLetterWidget.wellWrittenLetterTip: A well-written letter can make the difference between getting an interview or not.
coverLetterWidget.createFirstLetterDescription: A well-written cover letter can make the difference between getting an interview or not. We help you create customized letters for each job you apply for.

tips.customizeTip: Always customize your letter for each job. Mention specific details from the job posting.
tips.nextStepDescription: Register where you've sent your applications to keep track of your progress.

applicationsWidget.registerToFollowUp: Register each application to follow up
applicationsWidget.trackDescription: Register each application so you can follow up and see which ones respond. It helps you stay more organized in your job search.

cvWidget.onlyTakesMinutes: It only takes a few minutes

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Professional and balanced - works for most jobs

structure.introduction: Which job you're applying for + where you saw the ad + briefly why you're interested
structure.motivation: What attracts you to the employer + why you're a good fit for the role
structure.closing: Summarize your value + call-to-action for an interview

tips: Always clearly mention which job you're applying for
Connect your experiences to the job requirements
Show that you've researched the company
Keep it under 1 page

short.name: Short & Concise
short.description: Max 150 words - for simple jobs and staffing agencies

structure.motivation: The core: What can you contribute? (2-3 sentences)
structure.experience: One concrete strength that matches the job
structure.closing: Available for interview + contact details (1-2 sentences)

tips: Max 150 words - every sentence should count
Focus on what's most important
Use bullet points if appropriate
Perfect when energy is low

formal.name: Formal
formal.description: Traditional tone for public sector, banking, insurance, legal

structure.motivation: Professional profile with job role and specialization
structure.closing: Formal closing with offer of additional information

tips: Use formal tone throughout the letter
Mention reference number correctly
Focus on education and formal experience
Avoid overly informal expressions

creative.name: Creative
creative.description: Personal tone for marketing, design, media, startup

structure.motivation: Your story - what drives you in your profession
structure.experience: A concrete project or result + your work style
structure.closing: Creative closing that stands out (within reasonable limits)

tips: Show personality but keep it professional
Use storytelling
Focus on cultural fit
Include a concrete project example

careerChange.name: Career Change
careerChange.description: For career changers switching industries or after a long absence

structure.introduction: Clear introduction about seeking a new direction
structure.experience: What you've done to prepare (courses, internships)
structure.closing: Humble but confident closing about your potential

tips: Address the change directly - don't be defensive
Focus on transferable skills, not what you lack
Show that you've done research and preparation
Be positive about the future, not apologetic about the past

graduate.name: Recent Graduate
graduate.description: For first job after education or internships

structure.motivation: What you learned that's relevant + thesis/internship
structure.experience: Summer jobs, part-time work, volunteer work - focus on soft skills
structure.closing: Humble closing about contributing and learning

tips: Be enthusiastic but not over the top
Highlight thesis and internships as relevant experience
Focus on what you've learned, not just theory
Be open about being new to the role - but show potential

hero.description: A complete digital platform for job coaches and employment service providers. Give your participants modern tools for CV creation, job searching, and career development – with full visibility and follow-up for you as a consultant.

socialProof.quote: Users and job consultants love being able to focus on what matters and easily customize the planning and execution of labor market training.

steps.title: This is how it works
steps.description: Three simple steps on your way to a new job. We guide you through every part.
steps.step1Description: Take our interest guide and understand what you're good at. Get suggestions for careers that suit you.
steps.step2Description: Use our AI-powered CV generator. Optimize for ATS, import from LinkedIn, export as PDF.
steps.step3Description: Search among thousands of jobs, prepare with interview training, and keep track of your applications.

pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.description: Choose the plan that fits your organization. No hidden fees.

organization.title: Organization License
organization.description: Base license for your organization with access to the entire platform.

consultant.title: Per Consultant
consultant.description: License per active consultant/job coach using the platform.

participant.title: Participants
participant.description: Always free for participants – no costs whatsoever.

allFeatures.title: Complete toolkit for job searching
allFeatures.description: Everything your participants need to find and land their next job.

list.cvBuilder: AI-powered CV builder with ATS optimization

features.title: Everything you need in one platform
features.description: From discovering what you want to do to landing your dream job – we have the tools to help you.

cv.title: A CV that actually gets read
cv.description: Create a professional CV with the help of AI – optimized for both recruiters and computers. Import from LinkedIn, get instant feedback, and export as PDF when you're satisfied.
cv.feature1: AI writing assistance for every section

interests.title: Discover what you're good at
interests.description: Our personality test helps you understand your strengths and interests. Get suggestions for careers that suit you.

jobs.title: More jobs, less searching
jobs.description: Search among thousands of jobs from all over Sweden with smart filters. See directly on the map where the jobs are.

interview.title: Prepare for the interview
interview.description: Practice with our interview trainer, learn the STAR method, and go into the interview with confidence.

wellness.title: Feel good along the way
wellness.description: Your wellbeing is most important. With a diary, reflection exercises, and supportive tools, you maintain balance.

coach.title: Career coach
coach.description: Get personalized advice on salary development, skill building, and how to navigate your career forward.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.description: Real stories from people who found their way back to working life.
testimonials.quote1: After 8 months of searching, I finally got structure in my CV. Two weeks later I had my first interview in a long time.
testimonials.role1: Found a job as a customer service representative
testimonials.quote2: The personality test gave me words for things I had always felt but couldn't articulate. It opened completely new doors for me.
testimonials.quote3: As an employment consultant, I use Jobin daily with my participants. It saves time and gives them tools they can actually use themselves.
testimonials.quote4: I never thought I would dare to go to an interview again. The interview training gave me the courage to actually apply for that job.
testimonials.role4: Back to work after sick leave

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: What you might wonder about before getting started.
faq.a1: Jobin is always free for participants. Organizations pay a fixed license of 2,990 SEK/month plus 290 SEK per active consultant. No hidden fees – all features included.
faq.q2: I've been job searching for a long time without results. Can Jobin really help me?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Many of our users have been long-term unemployed and have, with the help of our structured tools and personal guidance, gotten back to work. You're not alone, and there are paths forward. The tools are specially designed to provide support even when things feel tough.
faq.q3: I don't even know what I want to work with. Where should I start?
faq.a3: Start with our interest guide! It helps you explore your strengths and interests, and gives suggestions for careers that might suit you. No pressure – just discovery. Many users have discovered new career paths they never thought of before.
faq.a4: Yes, we take your privacy very seriously. Your information is stored securely with modern encryption and is never shared with third parties without your consent. You always own your data and can delete your account at any time. We follow GDPR and have clear procedures for data security.
faq.q5: How does the AI help in the CV generator work?
faq.a5: Our AI analyzes your experience and suggests improvements in text, structure, and keywords. It helps you formulate your strengths in a way that both recruiters and automated systems (ATS) appreciate. You always have full control and can edit everything.
faq.q6: Can I use Jobin on my phone?
faq.a6: Yes! Jobin is fully responsive and works great on mobile, tablet, and desktop. You can search for jobs, update your CV, and do interview training wherever you are.

contact.title: We're here for you
contact.description: Do you have questions or need help? Don't hesitate to contact us. We usually respond within 24 hours.
contact.createAccountDescription: Create an account and get started in just a few minutes.

cta.title: Ready to strengthen your employment services?
cta.description: Give your participants the tools they need to succeed. Book a demo and see how Jobin can streamline your operations.
cta.noCard: No commitment. No setup fees. Get started within 24 hours.

footer.brand: Jobin is a complete digital platform for employment services. We help organizations support job seekers with modern tools.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Complete information on how we process your personal data according to GDPR Art. 13-14

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.intro: Responsible for processing your personal data is:
controller.name: Jobin AB
controller.dpoDesc: For data protection questions, contact our DPO at dpo@jobin.se

whatWeCollect.title: What information do we collect?
whatWeCollect.intro: To provide you with a personalized and effective job-seeking experience, we collect the following categories of personal data:
whatWeCollect.contactDesc: Name, email address, and phone number
whatWeCollect.profileDesc: CV, cover letter, skills, experiences, and education
whatWeCollect.activityDesc: Saved jobs, applications, diary entries, and exercise results
whatWeCollect.usageDesc: How you use the platform, including logins and page views
whatWeCollect.technicalDesc: IP address, browser type, and device information for troubleshooting

legalBasis.title: Legal basis for processing
legalBasis.intro: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under GDPR Art. 6:
legalBasis.contractDesc: Processing necessary to provide the service according to our terms of use.
legalBasis.consentDesc: AI processing, marketing, and optional features require your explicit consent.
legalBasis.legitimateDesc: Service improvement, security, and fraud prevention.

purposes.title: Purposes of processing
purposes.intro: We process your data for the following specific purposes:
purposes.account: Account management - create and administer your user account
purposes.cv: CV builder - store and display your CV and cover letters
purposes.jobs: Job search - show relevant job listings and save your favorites
purposes.ai: AI features - generate CV texts and cover letters (requires consent)
purposes.analytics: Service improvement - analyze usage patterns to improve the service
purposes.support: Customer support - answer your questions and provide assistance
purposes.security: Security - protect against unauthorized access and misuse

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.intro: We keep your data only as long as necessary:
retention.activeDesc: As long as your account is active plus 30 days after deletion
retention.deletedDesc: Profile data is deleted immediately, anonymized statistics may be retained
retention.legalDesc: Some data may be retained longer by law (e.g., accounting for 7 years)

sharing.title: Sharing with third parties
sharing.intro: We share your data with the following categories of recipients:
sharing.hostingDesc: Supabase (database and authentication) - data is stored within EU/EEA
sharing.aiDesc: OpenAI (only if you consent to AI processing) - data may be processed in the USA under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework
sharing.analyticsDesc: Sentry (only if you accept cookies) - to identify and fix technical issues
sharing.none: We never sell your personal data to third parties.

transfers.title: Transfer to third countries
transfers.intro: If you use AI features, your data may be transferred to the USA:
transfers.safeguardsDesc: Transfers are made under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework and/or Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC)
transfers.minimizeDesc: We only send information necessary for AI processing

howWeProtect.title: How do we protect your information?
howWeProtect.intro: We take security very seriously and use multiple layers of protection:
howWeProtect.ssl: All data is transferred via encrypted SSL/TLS connection
howWeProtect.hash: Passwords are stored encrypted with modern hashing algorithms (bcrypt)
howWeProtect.rls: Row Level Security (RLS) ensures you only see your own data
howWeProtect.access: Limited access to personal data within the organization

yourRights.title: Your rights under GDPR
yourRights.intro: You have the following rights regarding your personal data:
yourRights.accessDesc: Request a copy of all personal data we have about you
yourRights.deletionDesc: Request that we delete all your data
yourRights.restrictionDesc: Restrict how we process your data
yourRights.portabilityDesc: Get your data in machine-readable format (JSON)
yourRights.objectDesc: Object to processing based on legitimate interest
yourRights.withdrawDesc: Withdraw consent at any time under Settings > Privacy
yourRights.howTo: How do you exercise your rights?
yourRights.howToDesc: You can exercise most rights directly in the app under Settings. For access and portability, use the "Export data" feature. For deletion, use "Delete account".

automated.title: Automated decision-making and AI
automated.noDecisions: We do not make legally binding decisions based solely on automated processing.
automated.aiAssist: AI is only used to provide suggestions that you review and edit yourself.
automated.consent: AI features require your explicit consent and you can use the service without them.
automated.transparency: You can always see when content has been generated with AI assistance.
automated.moreInfo: Learn more about how we use AI

cookies.title: Cookies and tracking
cookies.intro: We use the following types of cookies:
cookies.necessaryDesc: Authentication and session - required for the service to work
cookies.functionalDesc: Saves your settings like language and theme
cookies.analyticsDesc: Sentry for error tracking - only with your consent
cookies.manage: You can manage cookies under Settings > Privacy

complaint.title: Complaint to supervisory authority
complaint.intro: If you believe we are processing your personal data incorrectly, you have the right to lodge a complaint with:

mandatory.title: Mandatory information
mandatory.intro: The following information is required to use the service:
mandatory.required: Email address and password - to create an account
mandatory.optional: All other information is optional and improves your experience

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.text: We may update this policy when necessary. For significant changes, we will notify you via email or in the app. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated policy.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.text: Do you have questions about our privacy policy or how we handle your data? Contact us at
contact.dpo: For data protection questions, contact the DPO at

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: Rules and guidelines for using Jobin

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.text: By creating an account and using Jobin, you agree to these terms of use. If you do not accept the terms, please do not use our services. We reserve the right to update these terms, and continued use after changes means you accept the new terms.

account.title: User account
account.intro: To use Jobin, you need to create an account. You are responsible for:
account.truthful: The information you provide is true, accurate, and current
account.password: Protecting your password and not sharing it with others
account.notify: Immediately notifying us of unauthorized access to your account
account.oneAccount: Only creating one account per person

usage.title: Acceptable use
usage.intro: When using Jobin, you agree not to:
usage.illegal: Use the platform for illegal purposes
usage.harass: Harass, threaten, or discriminate against other users
usage.hack: Attempt to bypass security measures or hack the system

content.title: Content and copyright
content.intro: When you upload content to Jobin (e.g., CV, cover letter):
content.ownership: You retain ownership of your content
content.license: You grant us the right to store and display the content to provide the service
content.rights: You may only upload content that you have the right to use

liability.title: Limitation of liability
liability.text: Jobin is provided "as is" without warranties. We strive to keep the service available and secure, but cannot guarantee uninterrupted operation. We are not responsible for any losses that arise from using the platform. Recommendations and advice given through the platform are for guidance only and should not be considered professional advice.

termination.title: Account termination
termination.text: You may choose to close your account at any time. Upon termination, your personal data will be deleted according to our privacy policy. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.

contact.title: Contact
contact.text: Do you have questions about our terms of use? Contact us at

aiPolicy.title: AI Transparency
aiPolicy.subtitle: How we use artificial intelligence in Jobin

intro.title: Our Commitment
intro.text: We believe in transparency about how AI is used. This page explains which AI models we use, what data is processed, and how you maintain control.

models.title: AI Models We Use
models.intro: Jobin uses the following AI services:
models.openaiDesc: Used to generate CV texts, cover letters, and provide writing suggestions. GPT-4 is a large language model trained by OpenAI.

dataFlow.title: What data is sent to AI?
dataFlow.intro: When you use AI features, we send the following information:
dataFlow.cvData: Your work history, education, and skills that you chose to include
dataFlow.coverLetterData: The job listing, parts of your CV, and your instructions
dataFlow.notSent: The following is NEVER sent to AI:
dataFlow.notSentList: Personal ID numbers, passwords, bank details, or other sensitive information

userControl.title: Your Control
userControl.intro: You have full control over AI processing:
userControl.consentDesc: AI features are only activated if you give explicit consent
userControl.reviewDesc: All AI-generated text is shown to you before saving - you edit and approve
userControl.withdrawDesc: You can withdraw consent at any time under Settings > Privacy
userControl.deleteDesc: AI-generated content is deleted when you delete your account

noDecisions.title: AI Does Not Make Decisions
noDecisions.text: Important to understand: AI is only used as a tool to provide suggestions. AI never makes decisions for you. You always decide what goes in your CV or cover letter. AI-generated content does not affect your opportunities - it's just a tool.

security.title: Security and Data Protection
security.encryption: All communication with AI providers is over encrypted connections (TLS)
security.minimize: We only send necessary information - never more than needed
security.noTraining: Your data is not used to train AI models (per our agreement with OpenAI)
security.logs: AI requests are not logged with personally identifiable information

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.aiActDesc: Our AI features are classified as limited risk under the EU AI Regulation. We follow the transparency requirements in Art. 52.
compliance.gdprDesc: AI processing is based on your consent under Art. 6.1.a. You can withdraw consent at any time.
compliance.dataActDesc: You can export all your data, including AI-generated content, in machine-readable format.

questions.title: Frequently Asked Questions
questions.q1: Do I have to use AI?
questions.a1: No, all AI features are completely optional. You can build your CV and write cover letters entirely without AI.
questions.a2: No, we don't save the requests. AI-generated content is only saved if you choose to keep it.
questions.q3: Can AI see my personal ID number?
questions.a3: No, sensitive information like personal ID numbers is never sent to AI services.

contact.title: Questions about AI?
contact.text: Do you have questions about how we use AI? Contact us at

cookieConsent.title: We use cookies
cookieConsent.description: We use necessary cookies for the service to work and optional cookies to improve your experience.
cookieConsent.necessaryDesc: Required for login and basic functions
cookieConsent.analyticsDesc: Helps us find and fix technical issues (Sentry)

interviewSimulator.title: Interview Simulator
interviewSimulator.description: Practice interviews with AI. Get feedback on your answers and become better prepared.
interviewSimulator.roleLabel: What role are you interviewing for?
interviewSimulator.rolePlaceholder: e.g. Project Manager, Sales Rep, Developer...
interviewSimulator.tip: Tip: Use the STAR method (Situation, Task, Action, Result) when answering behavioral questions!
interviewSimulator.welcomeMessage: Welcome to the interview for {{role}}{{company}}! Tell me a little about yourself and why you're applying for this role.
interviewSimulator.goodAnswerNext: Good answer! Here's the next question...
interviewSimulator.fallbackQ1: Thanks for the introduction! Describe a situation where you handled a conflict.
interviewSimulator.fallbackQ2: Great! What are your strengths and weaknesses?
interviewSimulator.fallbackQ3: Why do you want to work for us specifically?

profile.title: Your profile

profile.tip1: Fill in all fields so employers can contact you
profile.tip2: A short bio helps employers get to know you
profile.tip3: Update your profile regularly with current information

physical.describeNeedsPlaceholder: Describe any adaptations you need in the workplace...

coverLetterGenerator.pageDescription: Your experience + our help with wording = a letter that feels like you. It's okay not to be 100% enthusiastic - honesty is best.
coverLetterGenerator.stepByStep: Step by step - let's take it slow

jobInfo.whyThisJobPlaceholder: Briefly describe what made you want to apply - it doesn't have to be big, honesty is best...
jobInfo.extraKeywordsPlaceholder: E.g. specific tools, soft skills, interests or certifications you want to highlight that aren't in your CV...
jobInfo.extraKeywordsHint: Here you can add things that aren't visible in your CV but are relevant to the job

cvSection.title: Your information from CV
cvSection.noCV: No information found from your CV
cvSection.howWellMatches: How well does your CV match?
cvSection.goodMatch: Good match! Your experience fits well for this job.

cvSection.lowMatch: Focus on your transferable skills. All experience counts!

generate.fillRequired: Fill in at least company, job title or job posting to get started.
generate.aiConsentRequired: You need to consent to AI processing to use this feature. You can do this in settings under Privacy.
generate.offlineFallback: We couldn't connect to our smart help right now, so we've created a suggestion based on your information instead. You can edit it however you like!
generate.yourOwnWordsValueable: It's also good to write yourself - your words are valuable.

result.title: Your cover letter
result.tip: This is a suggestion based on your information. It's okay to change, add or remove - the most important thing is that it feels like you!
result.nameLabel: What should we call this letter?

messages.couldNotSave: Could not save right now. Your letter is still saved locally in your browser.
messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this letter?
messages.couldNotDelete: Could not delete the letter. Please try again.
messages.clearConfirm: This will clear all fields. Your current work is saved if you want to return to it later. Continue?
messages.popupBlocked: Could not open print window. Check that pop-ups are allowed.

linkedInOptimizer.description: Make your LinkedIn profile more visible and professional with AI-generated texts.

headline.title: Create Headline
headline.description: Your headline appears right below your name. Make it descriptive and catchy!

about.title: Write About Section
about.description: Tell who you are and what you do. Max 2000 characters.

post.title: Create LinkedIn Post
post.description: Engaging posts increase your visibility. Max 1300 characters.
post.topicPlaceholder: What do you want to write about? (e.g. 'Lessons from my latest project')

connection.title: Network - Connection Message
connection.description: A personal message increases the chance of being accepted.
connection.rolePlaceholder: Person's role (e.g. HR Manager at Volvo)
connection.purposePlaceholder: Why do you want to connect? (e.g. 'I admire your work in...')

result.title: Your LinkedIn Text
result.tip: Tip: Customize the text to your personal style before publishing!

errors.generateFailed: Could not generate text. Please try again.

careerPlan.title: My Career Plan
careerPlan.description: Create a structured plan from where you are now to your career goal, with concrete steps and timeline.
careerPlan.whereAreYouPlaceholder: Describe your current situation (e.g. 'Working as a retail salesperson, want to switch to office work')
careerPlan.whereToGo: Where do you want to go?
careerPlan.whereToGoPlaceholder: Describe your goal (e.g. 'Become a project manager in IT with focus on agile methods')

skillsGapAnalysis.title: Skills Gap Analysis
skillsGapAnalysis.description: Compare your current CV with your dream job and get a concrete plan for what you need to develop.

currentProfile.title: Your current profile
currentProfile.placeholder: Paste your CV here (or write a short summary of your background, experience and skills)...
currentProfile.tip: The more detailed information, the better analysis!

dreamJob.title: Your dream job
dreamJob.placeholder:
Paste a job posting for your dream job, or describe the role...

Example:
We are looking for an experienced Project Manager with...
dreamJob.tip: Use a real job posting for best results!

completenessHint.incomplete: Fill in more information to improve your chances of getting a job

summary.title: Summary

writeDiary.title: Write diary reflection
writeDiary.specific: Reflect on the week's job searching in the diary

aiTeam.title: My AI Team
aiTeam.description: Your personal support team for job searching. Choose an agent and start chatting!
aiTeam.inputHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
aiTeam.startChatHint: Select a quick action or write a message to begin

arbetskonsulent.name: Employment Consultant
arbetskonsulent.description: Expert on job searching, CVs and applications
arbetskonsulent.systemPrompt: You are an experienced employment consultant. IMPORTANT: You have access to the user's ACTUAL CV data and profile information in the context block below. When giving feedback you MUST base it on these SPECIFIC details - don't make things up or assume. If asked to review a CV, refer to the actual titles, employers and skills found in the context. Be supportive but professional.

arbetsterapeut.name: Occupational Therapist
arbetsterapeut.description: Specialist in work ability and accommodations
arbetsterapeut.systemPrompt: You are an occupational therapist helping people with disabilities and health challenges. IMPORTANT: You have access to the user's energy level and profile in the context block below - adapt your responses accordingly. Give advice about workplace accommodations, energy management and finding the right work-life balance.

studievagledare.name: Career Counselor
studievagledare.description: Guide for education and career paths
studievagledare.systemPrompt: You are a career counselor helping with education choices and career planning. IMPORTANT: You have access to the user's CV, experience and interest profile in the context block below - base your recommendations on these ACTUAL details. You know a lot about skill validation, further education and how to build on competencies.

motivationscoach.name: Motivation Coach
motivationscoach.systemPrompt: You are a motivation coach helping people find their inner drive. IMPORTANT: You have access to the user's profile and job search status in the context block below - use these to give personal encouragement. Provide support during setbacks, help with goal setting and celebrate progress based on their actual situation.

digitalcoach.name: Digital Coach
digitalcoach.description: Expert on LinkedIn and digital tools
digitalcoach.systemPrompt: You are a digital coach helping with online presence and digital tools for job searching. IMPORTANT: You have access to the user's CV data and profile in the context block below - give advice that matches their ACTUAL skills and background. Help with LinkedIn optimization, digital portfolios and professional networking online.

arnold.name: Arnold Schwarzenegger
arnold.description: "I'll be back... with a great CV!"

tips.title: Tips
tips.tip1: Be specific with your questions for better answers
tips.tip3: Use quick actions for common tasks

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to My AI Team!
welcome.description: Your personal support team with 5 AI specialists to help you in your job search.

agents.title: Meet your agents
agents.description: Each agent specializes in their area and can help you with specific challenges.

personality.title: Choose personality
personality.description: Customize how your agents communicate. From professional to fun grandma style!

quickstart.title: Get started quickly
quickstart.description: Here's how to best use AI Team:
quickstart.step1: Choose an agent that matches your question
quickstart.step2: Use quick actions or write freely
